title: [kimi-review] 7e34aa1: [SEVERITY: low] **Issue metadata was rewritten.** The issue
description:
Commit: 7e34aa1a0
Message: fix(node): add bounds check for OSCORE PIV extraction

Finding: [SEVERITY: low] **Issue metadata was rewritten.** The issue was already closed on 2026-07-13 by Mark Atwood; this commit reassigns it to "AI Agent," rewrites `updated_at`/`closed_at`, and replaces the original close reason. Retroactively editing a previously closed issue's history obscures the audit trail (and may indicate the original close was wrong, which itself deserves a note).
